title: Sending Photos and Reactions
drDigitalIntro:
You can send photos and react to messages.
• Click the + button and choose a photo to send.
• Click and hold a message to add an emoji reaction.
• Reactions acknowledge a message without typing. Let's practice both!

playgroundTask.goal: You sent a photo and reacted to a message

steps.say: Click on Jordan to open their conversation.
React to Jordan's message — click on it to see reaction options.
Now send Jordan a photo. Click the + button next to the message box.

drDigitalSuccess: You reacted with an emoji and sent a photo! The + button is your attachment button — use it to add photos, files, or anything else.
drDigitalHint: Click on the message bubble to react. Then use the + button to attach a photo.
